App.title: FlowState
App.description: Mindful Pomodoro with session-aware task suggestions

guest.title: Welcome to FlowState
guest.body: Add a task, tap Focus on it, then start a focus cycle. When you're ready for more, sign in to unlock energy check-ins and smart task suggestions after each cycle.

authenticated.title: Your wedge workflow
authenticated.body: When a focus cycle ends, you'll get a quick energy check-in. FlowState then suggests your best next task with a short rationale — accept the suggestion or pick any other task to focus.

coach.checkIn: This quick check-in helps FlowState suggest what fits your energy.
coach.suggestion: Accept the suggestion or tap Focus on any other task — you're always in control.
coach.postMergeCheckIn: Now that you're signed in, this check-in unlocks personalized next-task suggestions.
coach.postMergeSuggestion: FlowState picked this based on your energy — accept it or choose any task.
coach.postMergeSuggestionWithPreset: Your {preset} preset helped shape this pick — accept it or choose any task.
coach.preset: Presets pre-fill work type and priority — tap Custom if you want full control.

authValue.signInSubtitle: Mindful focus cycles on your tasks — sign in to unlock full sessions, energy check-ins, and session-aware suggestions.
authValue.signUpLine1: Run focus cycles on the tasks you choose, one at a time.
authValue.signUpLine2: After each cycle, log a quick energy check-in.
authValue.signUpLine3: FlowState suggests your best next task with a short rationale.

transition.breakStartShort: A brief pause — let your mind reset.
transition.breakStartLong: A longer rest — step away if you can, then return when ready.
transition.breakReentryFocused: Ready when you are — your focus is still here.
transition.breakReentrySteady: Ease back in — one cycle at a time.
transition.breakReentryNeutral: Break complete — ready for the next cycle.

windDown.title: Ready to wrap up?
windDown.body: You've been at it a while — ending now is a valid choice, or you can keep going.

endSession.title: End this session?
endSession.bodyWork: Finished cycles and completed tasks will appear in your summary. This in-progress focus block won't be counted.
endSession.bodyBreak: The current cycle will stop and you'll see a short session summary. You can start fresh whenever you're ready.
endSession.pauseBodyWork: Finished cycles and completed tasks will appear in your summary. Your paused focus block won't be counted.
endSession.pauseBodyBreak: Your timer is paused. Ending now will close the session and show a short summary — you can return when you're ready.

narrative.pauseCapWithEnergy: Your pause ran long — session complete — {stats}. {energy}.
narrative.pauseCapNoEnergy: Your pause ran long — session complete — {stats}. Take a breath.
narrative.taskDone: {count, plural, =0 {} one {# task done} other {# tasks done}}

CatchUp.breakConfirmSubcopy: Ready for your next cycle when you are.
CatchUp.checkInHeadline: Work cycle finished while you were away
CatchUp.checkInSubcopy: Take a moment for your energy check-in below.
CatchUp.suggestionSubcopy: Review the suggested next task below.

banner.deviceOnly: Your tasks are saved on this device only.

merge.title: Your trial work is saved
merge.unlockLine: You now have full sessions, energy check-ins, and session-aware task suggestions.

Suggestion.overrideAck: Your pick is noted — we'll use it for the next suggestion.
Suggestion.heading: Suggested next task
Suggestion.statusEmpty: No active tasks — add one or end session.
Suggestion.statusError: Could not load a suggestion. Your break is still running.

rationale.energy_deep: Deep work — you're focused with few interruptions
rationale.energy_light: Light ops — energy fading, better suited for lighter tasks
rationale.fatigue_many: Light admin — energy dipping after {cycles} cycles
rationale.late_day: Light task — late in the day, save deep work for tomorrow
rationale.interruptions: Reactive work — session had several interruptions
rationale.override_preference: Matches your last pick — continuing that thread
rationale.eisenhower_priority: High urgency and importance — top of the queue
rationale.importance_focus: Important work — good moment while you're focused
rationale.low_effort_fit: Quick win — fits your fading energy
rationale.kickoff_fresh: Fresh session — here's a strong starting point
rationale.kickoff_resume: Back from break — ready for your next focus block
rationale.default: Next up based on your energy and task mix

personaTrust.focus: deep work matches how you framed this
personaTrust.warm-up: a light warm-up fits your choice
personaTrust.research: research fits how you framed this
personaTrust.quick: a quick task fits your choice

Tasks.resumeNotePlaceholder: One line for when you return to this task
Tasks.archiveDescription: Review tasks that have been quiet for 3+ days
Tasks.archiveEmptyHint: Tasks without activity for 3 days move here automatically.
Tasks.archiveDeleteConfirmBody: These tasks will be removed. This can't be undone.

Home.offlineBanner: You're offline — retry when you're back online.
Home.tagline: Manage your tasks. Stay in flow.
Home.purposeHeader: A calm answer to: what to do next?

CycleComplete.breakReentryFallback: {breakLabel} complete — ready for the next cycle.
CycleComplete.workTaskInactiveNote: This task is no longer active — you can only continue later.

MidCycle.heading: Task complete
MidCycle.bodyHasOthers: Continue this cycle with another task, or end now for a break.
MidCycle.bodyNoOthers: No other active tasks — end the cycle and take a break.
MidCycle.resumeNotePlaceholder: One line — where you left off on the next task

WedgeSync.savedCheckIn: Your work cycle is saved on this device.
WedgeSync.savedCompleteWork: Your check-in is saved — we will finish the transition when you retry.
WedgeSync.savedKickoffSession: Your session has not started yet.
WedgeSync.savedKickoffSuggestion: Your session is ready — we will load a suggestion when you retry.
WedgeSync.heading: Sync recovery
WedgeSync.energyNote: Energy: {label} — no need to pick again.

EmptyTasks.guest: No active tasks yet — add one to start a focus cycle. Sign in to unlock energy check-ins and smart suggestions.
EmptyTasks.authenticated: No active tasks yet — add one to start a focus cycle.

cycle.suggestionDecisionSaveFailed: Could not save suggestion preference. Your choice is kept locally.
cycle.kickoffSuggestionLoadFailed: Could not load kickoff suggestion. Try again.
cycle.sessionStartFailed: Could not start your session. Try again.
cycle.cycleInProgress: Finish or dismiss the current cycle before starting another.
cycle.noTaskSelected: Select a task before starting a cycle.
cycle.startFailed: Could not start the cycle. Check your connection and try again.
cycle.interruptFailed: Could not interrupt the cycle. Try again.
cycle.pauseFailed: Could not pause the cycle. Try again.
cycle.resumeFailed: Could not resume the cycle. Try again.
cycle.breakStartFailed: Break could not start. Your work cycle was saved.
cycle.completionSaveFailed: Could not save cycle completion. Check your connection and try again.
cycle.switchTaskFailed: Could not switch tasks. Try again.
cycle.checkInSaveFailed: Could not save check-in. Try again.
cycle.suggestionLoadBreakRunning: Could not load suggestion. Your break is running — tap Retry.
cycle.suggestionLoadFailed: Could not load suggestion. Try again.
cycle.endSessionFailed: Could not end the session. Try again.

task.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

validation.emailMax: Email must be 254 characters or less
validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.passwordMax: Password must be 128 characters or less

common.networkError: Could not complete the request. Please check your connection and try again.

signIn.title: Sign in to FlowState
signIn.oauthError: Could not sign in with Google. Please try again or use email and password.
signIn.resetSuccess: Password updated. Sign in with your new password.
signIn.invalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. Please try again.

signUp.title: Create account
signUp.oauthError: Could not sign up with Google. Please try again or use email and password.

validation.nameMax: Name must be 100 characters or less

error.emailExists: This email is already associated with an existing account
error.generic: Could not complete the request. Please try again.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.successMessage: If an account exists for that email, we've sent a reset link.
forgotPassword.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
resetPassword.invalidLink: This reset link is invalid or has expired.

SessionSteering.energyBody: We'll use this to suggest your first task.
SessionSteering.focusBody: Helps bias your first task suggestion.

CheckIn.heading: How's your energy?
CheckIn.description: Select one before your break starts.

FocusBudget.title: Today's focus hours
FocusBudget.body: Set a daily budget so suggestions fit what you have left.
FocusBudget.saveError: Could not save focus hours. Try again.
FocusBudget.validationError: Enter focus hours between 15 and 720 minutes.

BreakAlerts.permissionDescription: When you are in another tab, FlowState can send a calm notification and play your break chime when a break starts. You can turn this off anytime in break settings.
